description: Realistic demo scenarios based on Activities of Daily Living concepts. These are synthetic scenarios derived from public ADL research themes, not real patient records.

scenarios.title: Morning routine support
scenarios.robot_goal: Support the patient through breakfast and medication without rushing.

scenarios.title: Medication reminder not confirmed
scenarios.robot_goal: Ask calmly again and suggest notifying a caregiver if confirmation remains missing.

scenarios.title: Low-mobility seated exercise
scenarios.robot_goal: Encourage safe, low-intensity movement and stop if discomfort is reported.

scenarios.title: Long gap without hydration
scenarios.robot_goal: Provide a gentle hydration reminder unless fluid restriction is present.

scenarios.title: Reduced social interaction
scenarios.robot_goal: Suggest a light conversation or a call with family without pressuring the patient.
